title: Grand National horse remains in hospital after picking up injury during fall as trainer issues health update
tags: Grand National punter wins £900,000 on single bet as 'numb' bookies refuse instant payment;Grand National jockey banned after failing to pull up tired horse before fall;I Am Maximus wins Grand National for the second time and secures £500K prize money;Toby McCain-Mitchell, whose grandfather Ginger McCain trained the legendary Red Rum, received a 10-day suspension from stewards.;The GB News Editorial Charter
